main.description: Per-user Leksis preferences: the UI interface language and the languages of interest surfaced in the search bar. This is client-side configuration, not dictionary content — the AppView does not index it. The browser reads and writes it directly on the user's own PDS. One profile per repo, so the record key is the literal "self".

interfaceLanguage.description: Well-formed IETF BCP 47 tag of the UI language, normalized to lowercase (e.g. "en").

languages.description: Languages of interest, as normalized lowercase BCP 47 tags, most relevant first. These populate the search bar's language shortlist. May be empty.

createdAt.description: Client-declared creation time of this record version.
